# Summary

Describe the milestone or repository maintenance change in a few sentences.

## Scope

- 

## Validation

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] `cargo check`
- [ ] `cargo test`

## Safety Checks

- [ ] PR targets `hiltonfam/Project-Sentinel:master`
- [ ] No PR opened against `RCGV1/Meshtastic-SAME-EAS-Alerter`
- [ ] Meshtastic remains primary and required, if sender behavior changed
- [ ] Optional senders remain best-effort, if sender behavior changed
- [ ] No unintended dependencies or integrations were added
